## Summary

Describe the research-framing problem and the behavior changed.

## Fidelity impact

- [ ] Actor, timing, information, behavior, constraints, and objective remain consistent.
- [ ] New factual or causal claims are sourced or explicitly labeled unverified.
- [ ] Public interfaces, benchmark cases, rubric rules, and hard-failure behavior are identified below.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `python tools/audit_repository.py --tracked`
- [ ] `python tools/check_links.py`
- [ ] Official `quick_validate.py skills/frame-business-research-problem` (when the Skill changed)
- [ ] Package build and verification (when installable content changed)

## Publication safety

- [ ] No credentials, private corpus, proprietary data, full articles, source documents, or long copied excerpts are included.
- [ ] Examples and fixtures are original, synthetic, or otherwise redistributable.
